name: DeleteRefreshmentPoint
description: Delete a refreshment from the system.
postconditions: The system shall notify the successful elimination of the point of rest.
The system shall notify the successful elimination of the point of rest.
Interruption ETOUR connection to the server.
steps: View a list of points of rest as a result of the use case SearchCulturalHeritage, it selects and activates a function of elimination.
Asks for confirmation of the transaction.
Deletes the selected point of rest.
